name: Soldiers: Heroes of World War II - Enhanced Edition
short_description: The first installment in the real-time tactics series that would become known as Men of War, now refreshed and enhanced! Take command of American, British, Soviet, or German forces and fight on the battlefields of World War II in 32 single-player missions or with others in PvP and co-op sessions.
detailed_description:
Step onto the battlefields of WWII in the real-time tactics game that laid the foundation for the Men of War series and lead elite units from the American, British, Soviet, or German armies in behind-enemy-lines operations that can shape the course of the war. Thanks to a major update from Best Way, you can now relive the nostalgia of Soldiers: Heroes of World War II in a fully updated and enhanced version – featuring modern system compatibility, widescreen support and graphics upscaled in up to 4K resolution, streamlined multiplayer via Steam, and a host of other improvements.

Across 32 historical missions, command over 100 authentic units, vehicles, and military equipment – playable not only in classic RTS style but also through Direct Control, allowing you to precisely manage any single unit on the field by manually moving, aiming, and firing. Use a fully interactive and highly destructible environment to your advantage, fire from cover, utilize stealth, and adapt your tactics to outsmart the cunning AI opponents or your friends in multiplayer matches. Demonstrate your command skills and do whatever it takes to achieve victory!

Enhanced Edition Features:

  • Native 4K resolution support, widescreen compatibility, and enhanced UI upscaling for HDPI displays while rendering the 3D scene at native resolution.

  • Full compatibility with Windows 10 and 11.

  • Updated and enhanced Editor – create new maps or modify existing missions.

  • Steam Workshop support to ease the distribution of community-generated content, including maps, missions, and mods.

  • Steam multiplayer network integration, providing seamless access to both vanilla and modded lobbies for PvP and co-op sessions with friends.

  • Integration of Steam achievements and community items.

  • Enhanced multi-core CPU support, improved overall stability, memory leak fixes, and various other technical optimizations.

The original, non-enhanced version of the game remains available via the "old_version - Original Soldiers: Heroes of WWII" beta branch.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
